name: Use of weak cryptographic algorithm
description: This code uses a cryptographic algorithm or mode that is considered broken or weak by modern standards. DES, 3DES, RC2, RC4, Blowfish, and the ECB block-cipher mode no longer provide meaningful confidentiality or integrity. MD2, MD4, MD5, and SHA-1 hashes are either fully broken or are collision-vulnerable in security contexts.
remediation: Use AES-GCM or AES-CTR (with a random, unique IV per message) for symmetric encryption. Use SHA-256, SHA-512, or SHA-3 for cryptographic hashing. For password storage, use Argon2, bcrypt, scrypt, or PBKDF2 with a per-user salt.

patterns.message_template: Cipher.getInstance("{{arg}}") uses a weak or broken cipher/mode
MessageDigest.getInstance("{{arg}}") uses a broken hash algorithm
